mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month momentum in retail sales signals strengthening household demand and near-term revenue growth, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot shows RSAFS available with one-month publication lag
failure_condition: Reject if the 3-month RSAFS momentum signal has Rank IC below 0.03 over two consecutive 3-year rolling windows or if positive retail-sales momentum does not produce higher 20-day returns than negative momentum.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate crosses above a restrictive threshold, higher discount rates reduce the present value of future earnings and predict negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations have positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if their mean return is not below the unconditional mean at p <= 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: Rising payroll employment combined with a falling unemployment rate signals broad labor-income growth that supports consumption and earnings, predicting positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint PAYEMS-up and UNRATE-down condition fails to deliver above-median 60-day forward returns in at least 55% of triggered observations during expansions.

mechanism_narrative: A downward break in industrial production signals weakening real activity and operating leverage pressure on earnings, predicting negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO crosses below its 6-month moving average
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot shows INDPRO available with one-month lag
failure_condition: Reject if INDPRO downside breaks are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if downside breaks have no lower mean return than non-break periods.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer prices while the policy rate is already high creates a stagflationary discount-rate shock, compressing equity multiples and predicting negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if the interaction term between CPIAUCSL acceleration and high FEDFUNDS has nonnegative coefficient in walk-forward regressions or triggered 60-day returns exceed the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in housing starts signals weakening interest-rate-sensitive demand and future construction-linked earnings pressure, predicting negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls more than 10% from its 12-month high
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST drawdown triggers have a 60-day forward return hit rate below 55% for negative returns or if their average return is not below non-triggered periods.

mechanism_narrative: Positive short-term momentum in industrial production signals improving factory output and cyclical earnings revisions, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if 1-month INDPRO momentum has Rank IC below 0.02 for 5-day returns in three consecutive 2-year rolling windows or if positive momentum weeks underperform negative momentum weeks.

mechanism_narrative: A low unemployment rate combined with restrictive policy signals late-cycle overheating, raising the probability of margin pressure and monetary restraint, predicting negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot shows UNRATE at 4.7 and FEDFUNDS at 5.25
failure_condition: Reject if the low-UNRATE and high-FEDFUNDS interaction does not produce lower 20-day returns than either condition alone or if the interaction coefficient is positive in walk-forward tests.
